mapper.select: SELECT f.flow_id, f.agent_id, f.client_id, f.role_type, f.sort_order, f.flow_status, c.ref_id AS prompt_id, p.prompt_content AS prompt_content FROM ai_flow f LEFT JOIN ai_config c ON c.owner_type = 'flow' AND c.owner_id = f.flow_id AND c.config_type = 'prompt' AND c.config_status = 1 LEFT JOIN ai_prompt p ON p.prompt_id = c.ref_id AND p.prompt_status = 1 WHERE f.agent_id = #{agentId} AND f.flow_status = 1 ORDER BY f.sort_order ASC

SELECT f.flow_id, f.agent_id, f.client_id, f.role_type, f.sort_order, f.flow_status, c.ref_id AS prompt_id, p.prompt_content AS prompt_content FROM ai_flow f LEFT JOIN ai_config c ON c.owner_type = 'flow' AND c.owner_id = f.flow_id AND c.config_type = 'prompt' LEFT JOIN ai_prompt p ON p.prompt_id = c.ref_id WHERE f.agent_id = #{agentId} ORDER BY f.sort_order ASC

SELECT f.flow_id, f.agent_id, f.client_id, f.role_type, f.sort_order, f.flow_status, c.ref_id AS prompt_id, p.prompt_content AS prompt_content FROM ai_flow f LEFT JOIN ai_config c ON c.owner_type = 'flow' AND c.owner_id = f.flow_id AND c.config_type = 'prompt' LEFT JOIN ai_prompt p ON p.prompt_id = c.ref_id WHERE f.flow_id = #{flowId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_flow (flow_id, agent_id, client_id, role_type, sort_order, flow_status) VALUES (#{flowId}, #{agentId}, #{clientId}, #{roleType}, #{sortOrder}, #{flowStatus})
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_flow SET flow_status = #{status} WHERE flow_id = #{flowId}
